skills_effects.description: Target recovers HP.
Target reflects incoming matching-damage-type for skill duration.
Target's stats decrease for curse duration.
Target becomes wounded. Loses health per turn.
Target's stats increase for buff duration.
skills_effects.notes: Can target specific stat, depending on skill, including elemental statuses. (HP, SP, TP, MP, PATK, PDEF, PHIT, PEVA, MATK, MDEF, MHIT, MEVA, FIR, WTR, AIR, ERT ,LGT, DRK)

skills_effects.description: Target becomes slowed. Target's initiative decreases during effect. Can recover by being hastened.
Target becomes burned. Loses health per turn.
Target becomes frozen. Cannot act. Can negate freeze by attacking with fire-type attacks.
Target becomes paralyzed. Cannot act.
Target becomes asleep. Cannot act. Can be woken on hit.
Target becomes poisoned. Loses health per turn.
Target becomes stone. Cannot act. Can become freed on hit.
Cannot use magic skills.
Cannot use physical skills.
Target becomes hastened. Target's initiative increases during effect. Can counter by being slowed.
Target becomes imobilized. Target's initiative decreases severely.
Target is charmed. Target will attack allies for duration.
Target is knocked down. Cannot act for one turn while it recovers stance.
Target negates incoming matching-damage-type for skill duration.
Target regenerates stat pool for skill duration.
Target prevents status effects for skill duration.
Target resists elemental weaknesses for skill duration.
Target has increased Stamina for skill duration.
Target has increased Stamina recovery for skill duration.
